questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the Hadoop distributed file system?
options: A) To provide data warehousing capabilities
B) To enable distributed data processing
C) To manage data replication
D) To improve query performance
questions.explanation: Hadoop distributed file system is designed to store and manage large amounts of data across a cluster of nodes, making it suitable for big data processing.

questions.question: Why is Hadoop not suitable for all types of data analysis?
options: A) Because it requires a large amount of memory
B) Because it is not scalable
C) Because it is not compatible with relational databases
D) All of the above
questions.explanation: Hadoop may not be suitable for all types of data analysis because it requires a large amount of memory, is not scalable, and is not compatible with relational databases.

questions.question: What is the main difference between Hadoop and relational databases?
options: A) Hadoop is designed for real-time data processing
B) Hadoop is designed for batch data processing
C) Hadoop is designed for relational data
D) Hadoop is designed for non-relational data
questions.explanation: Hadoop is designed for batch data processing, while relational databases are designed for real-time data processing and are optimized for structured data.

questions.question: Why is Hadoop considered more suitable for big data processing than relational databases?
options: A) Because it is more scalable
B) Because it is more efficient
C) Both A and B
D) Neither A nor B
questions.explanation: Hadoop is considered more suitable for big data processing than relational databases because it is more scalable and can handle large amounts of data.

questions.question: What is the primary advantage of using Hadoop over relational databases for data analysis?
options: A) It provides faster data processing
B) It provides real-time data processing
C) It provides data scalability
D) It provides data integration
questions.explanation: Hadoop provides real-time data processing, making it suitable for data analysis tasks that require fast processing of large amounts of data.
